component.name: cmux
component.summary: Terminal multiplexer with split panes, workspaces, and WebAuthn

description.p: cmux is a GTK4 terminal multiplexer built on libghostty, providing tabbed workspaces, split pane management, a sidebar for workspace navigation, and session persistence.

Features include a JSON-RPC socket control interface, hot-reloadable configuration, and integrated FIDO2/WebAuthn support via zig-ctap2 for hardware security key authentication directly in the terminal.
Initial Linux MVP with GTK4 + libghostty integration.
